data.title: Bitcoin Bounces Back To $90,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Rally Into Thanksgiving
data.description:

source: https://solanafloor.com/news/layer-33-launches-coordinated-effort-to-preserve-solana-s-decentralization

data.title: Tether Becomes the Largest Independent Holder of Gold — Here Is What That Means for Crypto
data.description:
Tether has officially emerged as the largest independent holder of gold, a significant milestone that could have profound implications for the cryptocurrency market. This development not only underscores Tether's commitment to backing its stablecoin with tangible assets, but it also raises questions about the future relationship between traditional commodities and digital currencies. The impact of this event may influence investor confidence in cryptocurrencies, shift market dynamics, and potentially stabilize the value of Tether’s stablecoin, especially during times of economic uncertainty. As Tether’s gold reserves grow, it may also lead to increased scrutiny from regulators and spark new discussions about the integration of gold and cryptocurrency in a modern financial ecosystem. Here is a closer look at what this means for the future of crypto and the interplay between these two asset classes.
source: https://blocknews.com/tether-becomes-the-largest-independent-holder-of-gold-here-is-what-that-means-for-crypto/

data.title: From Zero to Hero: LunarCrush Reveals How Monad’s Launch Drove a 550× Engagement Rate and a Top‑Ten AltRank
data.description:

LunarCrush readings showed AltRank in the top ten, a Galaxy Score near the mid-50s, and roughly 31. 97k mentions that drove about 17. 62 million engagements, or about 551 interactions per post. The first trading […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/from-zero-to-hero-lunarcrush-reveals-how-monads-launch-drove-a-550-engagement-rate-and-a-top-ten-altrank/

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book: Multiple reports indicate businesses may face financial pressure due to tariffs.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Multiple reports indicate that corporate profit margins are squeezed, possibly due to financial pressure from tariffs. (Jinshi)

data.title: The U.S. Treasury announced the replacement index figure for the October CPI based on Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities.
data.description: The U.S. Treasury Department announced the index figure based on the index contingency provisions of its Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS). In a press release, the Treasury stated that the index figure for October 2025 was 325.604. For payment obligations that rely on the October 2025 CPI, the Treasury will use this index figure as the basis for calculations. Even if the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) subsequently releases the actual October 2025 CPI, the Treasury will not replace this index figure. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Announces Index Value for Inflation-Protected Bonds
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Treasury Department has announced the index value for inflation-protected bonds based on the emergency clause of the index. In a press release, the Treasury stated that the index value for October 2025 is set at 325.604. This figure will be used as the basis for calculating payment obligations that rely on the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for October 2025. Even if the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) later releases the actual CPI for October 2025, the Treasury will not replace this index number.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Beige Book Highlights Business Profit Margin Pressures
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's Beige Book reveals that several reports indicate businesses are experiencing squeezed profit margins. This financial strain may be attributed to tariffs.

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book Highlights Economic Stability
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's Beige Book indicates that economic activity has largely remained unchanged across most regions since the previous report. However, two regions noted a slight decline in economic activity, while one region reported a modest increase.

data.title: "Liquidation King" Brother Machi continues to add to his long positions in ETH and HYPE, and now has a floating profit of over $860,000.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi has continued to increase his long positions in ETH and HYPE, and has now made a floating profit of $863,000. Specifically: ETH long position: position value of $16.76 million, floating profit of $613,000; HYPE long position: position value of $4.42 million, floating profit of $250,000.

data.title: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book reported that most districts indicated that economic activity was essentially unchanged from the previous reading.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Most districts reported that economic activity was largely unchanged since the last report; however, two districts noted a slight decline in activity, while one district reported a slight increase. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Beige Book: Employment declined slightly during the reporting period.
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Beige Book: Employment declined slightly during the reporting period, with about half of the districts reporting weak labor demand. (Jinshi)
